summary: Enthusiastic fan praise for this newly discovered show, but reviewers give no specifics on audio fidelity or musical highlights.
review: The sole review is glowing, celebrating the discovery of a long‑sought recording and expressing a desire to own it on CD. While the reviewer rates it five stars and calls it a "real good time," there are no comments about sound quality, performance nuances, or specific songs.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, highly positive review; rating reflects enthusiasm but lacks detail to assess recording or show quality comprehensively.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type; only general excitement about the audio's availability.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Review provides no information on set structure or pacing.
